metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the DDD Sparring Partner — a Plöd-L3 interrogator agent for Domain-Driven Design ideation, with Mermaid visual companions via /ddd:diagrams.

plugins.name: ddd-agent
plugins.description: Personal DDD ideation sparring partner. Plöd-L3 interrogator that pushes back on tactical-design shortcuts. Ideation + Mermaid visual companions — Cynefin framing, Event Storming, Domain Storytelling, Bounded Context Canvas, Context Mapping, interview-driven diagram catalog (14 IDs, 4 tiers).
